## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(nit): ...`, `fix(nit): ...`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] Behavior changes are covered by tests
- [ ] Changes to `annotations.json` (`src/types.ts`) are additive only
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `docs/wiki/`) if user-facing behavior changed
